Comfrt: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates! Stop to stop

Comfrt: 

Hey! We noticed you eyeing our top-selling collection.

 We are almost sold out of your size but wanted to give you a huge discount to join the Comfrt family and 1 million happy customers before it's sold out.

Use COMFRT15 for 15% OFF (valid for 24hrs)

 https://comfrt.attn.tv/aUhrfgJp1Kw2 . Stop to stop

Comfrt: Hey there, this is Samantha. Thanks for checking out our site! 😊 https://comfrt.attn.tv/aLxUTqg6Xr4-

Anything I can help with?
 Stop to stop

Comfrt: Hey! My name is Samantha, I noticed you checking out our website. I wanted to let you know that we are very low on stock for most items and are running our biggest sale EVER. 

Now would be the absolute best time to grab a set from us! 

https://comfrt.attn.tv/a5m-xU6jE7KR . Stop to stop
What I want is out of stock

Comfrt: We're expecting a restock this month! Please visit the product page for the item you want and click "notify when available" to receive an SMS alert as soon as it's back in stock.

Alternatively, if you let me know what you're looking for and your size, I can check for any available alternatives for you.
I did sign up for notifications on the hoodie I want

Comfrt: Great! Thank you for signing up for the notification email! I'll let you know as soon as the item is back in stock.

While you're waiting, you might want to check out our other hoodies here: https://comfrt.attn.tv/a2kiRQtag7vU I understand it's tough to wait, and I hope you find something you like in the meantime!
I'll wait for the one I want

Comfrt: I understand. Hopefully it will be available soon. Feel free to reach out anytime in the future, I'm always here to help. While I have you, you can take a peek at our CuddleCloud weighted blanket to help reduce insomnia, stress, anxiety, depression, and overall fatigue: https://comfrt.attn.tv/ahNdlI2GKo4-
It's nice but way out of my budget
Comfrt: Oh, this is actually a discounted price as the original price is $305 and now on $210, if you wanted to place an order I'll be happy to help so we can take advantage of this great deal!

(attn) Hey, I need help with something:
Ariat: Yes, how can I help you?
I purchased my husband a pair of boots. They sent me the correct boot style, not the correct color
Ariat: Sorry to hear that! For issues like these, the best way to handle this is to use this form here: https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/VQNeh4Jz and your question will be routed to the correct department.
Now I'd like to buy him the original color I originally ordered. What can I do to receive the correct color
Ariat: My apologies! Just to be sure, will you like to keep the other one and order a new one in the right color?
Yes. I did keep the first order. Now I'm going to order the original color we first ordered.
The color on the box was correct.  The order I selected was  correct but not the boot. Wrong boot in the correct box
Ariat: No worries. I see you've purchased the Hybrid Rancher Western boot. Is that correct? Do you mind also confirming your desired color?
I'd like the distressed 1
I received the chocolate brown the first order
I need the distressed look
I received the brown oiled rowdy. This was not the color we selected. But, I let my husband still keep them.
Now I'd like to order the color I selected but did not receive
I'd just like to be sure that I'd be receiving the correct boot.

Ariat: Happy to help! You can find the Distressed Brown variation here - https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/8PYRR96S. Be sure to select the appropriate width after your desired size. 
Feel free to reach out if you need anything else.
